title: Sanji Returns to Luffy
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Judge, Sanji, Big Mom as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that big mom is on our side,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Germa will finally rise to enough power to conquer the North Blue Once More!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tomorrow is a big day for us... and this is but a pre-game to the real deal!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you think about it, that "failure" of ours also managed to come to use for us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: True that! We've really managed to capture an enormous fish with Sanji as the bait!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once our Army can proudly display big mom's jolly Roger on our ships, our enemies will lose all will to fight!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be able to conquer the seas with more power than we've ever had before. Let's all thank Sanji for his contribution.

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Ha! to the "Failure"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: to the "dud"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Cheers!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: in front of the Vinsmoke Guest- Room.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't let any of the Vinsmokes contact a single person...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: between now and the ceremony tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Roger.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've finished positioning some of our soldiers around the infirmary where Reiji, the eldest sibling, is located as well.

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: the Vinsmokes....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: now have no option but to patiently wait for their fate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Quit blabbering, Idiot! Geez...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: in the outskirts of the town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: THANDI ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I never told you to wait.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hurry up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And get out of my sight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "I refuse.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shishishi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If you think you can...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Eat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I dropped it on the way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And it got all messed up.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WAHA...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It even got rain on it... what a failure of a meal, am I right?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 31 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
